what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment metadata record that links an image asset to the design-source channel via a YAML frontmatter block.
observations: file body is empty after the frontmatter
standouts: References an image asset with an image:// URI scheme
Serves as a durable, id-stamped attachment record
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Follows an att- prefixed identifier convention
References external media via a channel-scoped image:// URI
Keeps the record minimal with no prose body
concerns: No caption, alt text, or description for the image
Target URI does not include a file extension or explicit MIME type
notes: A bare attachment stub that points the design-source channel to an image asset named p-43.
questions: What image content does p-43 represent?
Which message or pitch references this attachment?
Is the image:// URI resolvable and versioned?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog an image attachment for a channel, and the frontmatter does exactly that.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, discoverable record that binds a specific image asset to the design-source channel.
contribution: A stable attachment id and a precise channel-to-image mapping that lets a fused system retrieve the referenced image asset by its attachment record.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory attachment metadata record with id att-cfb55a3c that associates the design-source channel with the image asset image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-43, added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to catalog an image attachment under the design-source channel for later retrieval and reference.
